gist.headline: PolliGPT joins the chat
gist.blurb: A wild PolliGPT appeared! We've added this fresh community-built chat interface to the Greenhouse showcase.
gist.summary: Added the community-built PolliGPT application to the apps showcase and Greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore PolliGPT directly from the community projects list.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) and the chunky monitor-headed robot companion looking at a retro computer terminal that displays a glowing chat interface, representing the new PolliGPT app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot looking at a retro computer terminal displaying a glowing chat interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'PolliGPT'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
